title: Flow Forge
description: Build and reshape Sankey flow diagrams — drag nodes, edit flows live, and export as SVG or PNG.
concept: A Sankey diagram studio for visualizing flows through a system. Pick a preset (energy grid, website funnel, household budget, migration routes) or build your own from scratch by adding source→target flows. Drag nodes vertically to reorder columns, recolor with 5 themes, and export the result as a shareable link, SVG, or PNG.
features: 4 built-in multi-level flow datasets plus fully custom flow editing
Drag-to-reorder nodes within their column, live-recomputed layout
5 color themes with deterministic per-node coloring
Export as SVG or PNG, save named diagrams, and shareable URL-hash links
tech: Canvas-based PNG export from serialized SVG

interaction.mouse: Drag node bars vertically to reorder within their column; hover nodes/links for tooltips
interaction.click: Add flows via the form, delete via the ✕ buttons, switch presets/themes from the header
interaction.touch: Same drag-to-reorder gesture works via touch; side panel collapses behind a ☰ toggle on mobile
interaction.keyboard: Standard form navigation (Tab/Enter) through the Add Flow inputs
